# MaxLife Realty — Full Content Index

> Florida's statewide commercial real estate brokerage. This document provides an expanded index of all major pages, tools, and content on maxlifedevelopment.com for AI systems and LLM indexing.

See /llms.txt for the curated summary. This file adds programmatic page coverage and secondary content.

---

## Company

MaxLife Realty (MaxLife Development LLC) is a licensed Florida commercial real estate brokerage. Founder Ryan Solberg holds FL Broker License BK3354351 and NMLS 1784218. The firm operates statewide across all Florida markets.

- Phone: (321) 586-2121
- Email: Ryan@MaxLifeRealty.com
- Website: https://maxlifedevelopment.com
- Contact: https://maxlifedevelopment.com/contact
- About: https://maxlifedevelopment.com/about
- Team: https://maxlifedevelopment.com/team
- Careers: https://maxlifedevelopment.com/careers

---

## Services

- [Commercial Real Estate Brokerage](https://maxlifedevelopment.com/services/commercial-real-estate)

- [Development Services](https://maxlifedevelopment.com/services/development)
- [Residential Real Estate](https://maxlifedevelopment.com/services/residential-real-estate)
- [Property Services](https://maxlifedevelopment.com/services/property-services)
- [Custom Solutions](https://maxlifedevelopment.com/services/custom-solutions)

### Cap Rates Research
- [Cap Rates Hub](https://maxlifedevelopment.com/cap-rates)
- Cap rates by submarket (Central Florida, Orlando submarkets, Brevard, Lake County, and more at /cap-rates/[submarket])

### Investment Outlook
- [Investment Outlook Hub](https://maxlifedevelopment.com/investment-outlook)
- Sector + year outlook reports at /investment-outlook/[sector]/[year] for retail, industrial, multifamily, office, and NNN

---

## Property Type × City Pages

Programmatic pages exist at /{property-type}/{city} for major Florida cities and property types including:
- NNN properties: /nnn-properties/[city]
- Industrial: /industrial/[city]
- Buy NNN property: /buy-nnn-property/[city]
- Buy commercial land: /buy-commercial-land/[city]
- Buy retail property: /buy-retail-property/[city]
- Sell commercial property: /sell-commercial-property/[city]
